MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-07-2023 IN 206, PLAINTIFF AUGUST L. READER, III, M.D.'S MOTION FOR TRIAL PREFERENCE WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY KYLE WILSON, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF AUGUST L. READER, III, M.D.; JOAN WOODARD, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT PACIFIC EYE ASSOCIATES, A MEDICAL CORPORATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIED THE MOTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT FOUND UNDER CCP SEC 36(A) THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN AND UNDER CCP SEC 36(E) THERE IS A PREJUDICE TO THE DEFENSE AND HARDSHIPS. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/23/23 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 REMAINS. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
